chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-211 of 2022. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 22.08.2022. Mr. Shahnawaz Brohi advocate for the applicant. Mr. Shahzado Saleem Nahiyoon, Additional Prosecutor General. Applicant is present on ad-interim pre-arrest bail. ORDER MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J:- Co-accused Badshah was arrested while transporting 34 sacks containing 1360 packets of Gutka on 03.02.2022 by police of P.S. Matli and booked in present crime. In the interrogation, he stated that he was going to handover Gutka to the applicant. Learned counsel for the applicant states that co-accused has been granted bail and there is no reliable evidence against the applicant. The application has not been opposed by learned Additional PG. Accordingly, since rule of consistency is attracted and statement of co-accused is to be weighed in the trial, this bail application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant vide order 04.03.2022 is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial court while deciding the case on merits. JUDGE Irfan Ali
